schedule_description: Similar to Vagaro. Salon/barber pages list services. Select service → pick provider → choose date → select time slot → fill info → confirm.
flow_steps: Navigate to the salon/barber page on booksy.com
Browse the service list and select the desired service
Select a date from the calendar
obstacles: Booksy may require an account to complete booking — report LOGIN_REQUIRED
Service list may be long — scroll to find the right category
Some providers may have limited availability — try 'Any available'
If prepayment is required, report PAYMENT_REQUIRED
Mobile-first layout — some elements may be hidden behind scroll
